interface.longDescription:
Ordering food just got easier with Yogiyo, now integrated with ChatGPT.
Now, connect with Yogiyo through ChatGPT, allowing you to receive natural food recommendations and easily place orders, just like in a conversation.
Ask about your mood or what menu best suits your situation, and ChatGPT will recommend dishes that suit your tastes. You can also discover popular local restaurants and a variety of menus right within the conversation.
Without complex searches or multiple screens, you can quickly and easily select your desired food and place your Yogiyo delivery order.
Experience a faster, smarter, and more convenient delivery ordering experience through ChatGPT and Yogiyo.
defaultPrompt: 강남역 근처 포장 가능한 맛집 지도로 보여줘
